loop1.title: Transfer readiness

loop1.title: Activity
loop1.note: This is a group card ($ctx) with no basket columns; the required transfer activity metrics (count, last transfer days, lifetime transfers) are not measured by the asset's electrical meter and are not available in the shared context buffer.

loop1.title: Source Transfer — Composite
loop1.note: Showing Input Voltage, Current, and Bypass Frequency trends. Readiness Score, Bypass Voltage, and Transfer Counts are not measured by this meter and are omitted.

loop2: 'ups-asset-dashboard/source-transfer' answers the prompt as routed; these cards cover quantities not recorded for this asset and render honest-blank per-leaf with the reason: Transfer readiness (No columns or recovery functions exist for the required 'readiness score', 'score-index', or 'transfer readiness' quantities; the card renders with honest blanks.); Activity (This is a group card ($ctx) with no basket columns; the required transfer activity metrics (count, last transfer days, lifetime transfers) are not measured by the asset's electrical meter and are not available in the shared context buffer.).
